sections.paragraph:
πεντηκόνταρχος, ου, ὁ (Ps.-X., Rep. Athen. 1, 2 al.; pap, LXX) leader of a company of fifty, military t.t. company commander 1 Cl 37:3.—DELG s.v. πέντε and ἄρχω C.

Ps.-X Ps.-X , s. X.—List 5

Athen Athen , III a.d.—List 5

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

t.t. t.t. = terminus technicus (termini technici), technical term(s)

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 795
